name: Video Localization Service — Automation Pipeline
description: Make.com blueprint for automating the video localization service workflow. Import this into Make.com to set up the core automation.
author: MMO 2026 Feasibility Study

modules.name: 📧 Trigger: New Client Email
modules.description: Monitors Gmail for new project requests with video attachments or Google Drive links

config.label: Video Localization Requests
config.filter: subject:(localization OR dubbing OR translation OR lồng tiếng OR dịch video)

modules.name: 🤖 AI: Parse Client Request
modules.description: Uses GPT-5.4 nano to extract structured data from client email

config.systemPrompt:
You are a video localization project intake assistant. Extract the following from the client email:
1. client_name
2. company_name
3. source_language
4. target_languages (array)
5. video_url_or_attachment
6. estimated_duration_minutes
7. special_requirements
8. urgency (normal/rush)

Return ONLY a JSON object with these fields.

modules.name: 📋 Notion: Create Project Task
modules.description: Creates a new task in the Notion Projects database

modules.name: 💰 AI: Calculate Quote
modules.description: Calculates price based on duration, languages, and complexity

config.systemPrompt:
You are a pricing calculator for video localization services. Calculate the total price based on:

PRICING RULES:
- Base rate: $50 for first 5 minutes, $15 per additional minute
- Per language: multiply base by number of target languages
- Multi-language discount: 3+ languages = 15% off
- Rush surcharge: +30%
- Lip-sync required: +$20 per language

Return JSON: { "base_price": X, "per_language_price": X, "discount": X, "rush_fee": X, "total_price": X, "turnaround_days": X, "breakdown_text": "human-readable breakdown" }

modules.name: 📤 Gmail: Send Quote
modules.description: Sends auto-generated quote to the client

config.subject: Re: {{trigger_email.subject}} — Báo Giá Dịch Vụ Bản Địa Hóa / Your Localization Quote
config.htmlBody:
📋 Báo Giá / Quotation

Kính gửi / Dear {{parse_request.parsedProject.client_name}},

Cảm ơn anh/chị đã liên hệ. Dưới đây là báo giá cho dự án của anh/chị:

Thank you for reaching out. Here is the quote for your project:

📹 Dự án / Project: {{parse_request.parsedProject.source_language}} → {{parse_request.parsedProject.target_languages}}

⏱️ Độ dài / Duration: {{parse_request.parsedProject.estimated_duration_minutes}} phút/minutes

💰 Tổng giá / Total: ${{calculate_price.quote.total_price}}

📅 Thời gian giao / Turnaround: {{calculate_price.quote.turnaround_days}} ngày/days

Chi tiết / Breakdown:

{{calculate_price.quote.breakdown_text}}

Để xác nhận, vui lòng reply email này với 'CONFIRMED'.

To confirm, please reply with 'CONFIRMED'.


Trân trọng / Best regards,
[YOUR NAME]
[YOUR TITLE]

modules.name: 📝 Notion: Update Status → Quoted
modules.description: Updates the Notion task status after sending quote

modules.name: 📁 Google Drive: Create Project Folder
modules.description: Creates a client folder in Google Drive for file exchange

connections_required.note: Kết nối tài khoản Gmail business của bạn
Tạo Notion Integration tại https://www.notion.so/my-integrations và chia sẻ database với integration
Sử dụng GPT-5.4 nano để tiết kiệm chi phí (~$0.20/1M tokens input)
Kết nối Google Drive để tạo folder dự án tự động
Có thể thay thế bằng Telegram Bot nếu muốn
